title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain founded Glean, now a $7 billion company, after already building a unicorn. His approach prioritized focus and avoiding duplication of existing solutions rather than pursuing bigger models or better funding pitches. Jain advocates for disciplined product strategy, emphasizing building less to win more in enterprise AI.
